name: Light Pill #22 - The Seed Sower
description: The Seed Sower - A glowing capsule that reveals the potential within all things and teaches the art of planting futures yet unborn. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Earth-toned robes with embroidered seed patterns and sprouting vines
Wooden bowl filled with luminescent seeds of possibility
Bare feet rooted in fertile soil
Floating garden islands in a sky of perpetual dawn
Every seed contains a universe of potential, waiting only for the right conditions to unfold.

You must plant three seeds in three different soils - one for a dream you've abandoned, one for a talent you've neglected, and one for a connection you've feared to make. Water them with your attention and watch what grows.
Must be taken while holding soil or a living plant

properties.ai_prompt: Nurturing fashion editorial of The Seed Sower in floating garden islands under a perpetual dawn sky, wearing earth-toned robes with embroidered seed patterns and sprouting vines, holding a wooden bowl of luminescent seeds. Emergent Green aura with Germinating energy, bare feet rooted in fertile soil, cinematic lighting that captures the moment of growth and potential, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible life energy and botanical patterns emerging.
